$description: Component tokens for Mobile Knob Container — the platform-specific base shape of the slider handle. No state variants and no icon. iOS renders as a pill-shaped CSS element (white fill, gray border, shadow). Android renders as an SVG image asset. KnobContainer is the structural base referenced by Knob and Icon Knob. Figma Reference: Node ID 350-20781

$component.name: Knob Container
$component.description: The bare container shape for the slider drag handle. Defines the dimensions, border-radius, background, border, and shadow for the knob shell — without any state (default/disabled) or icon overlay. iOS uses a CSS-rendered pill shape; Android uses an SVG image asset due to platform-specific shadow rendering requirements.
$component.structure: iOS: a single div with pill border-radius, white background, gray/400 border, and shadow/md. Android: an absolutely-positioned SVG image asset (the circular knob with shadow is baked into the image).

platform.iOS: Pill shape (38×24px). CSS-rendered with white background, gray/400 border, and shadow/md drop shadow.
platform.Android: Circle shape (24×24px). SVG image asset — visual shadow and fill are embedded in the image.

usage.contexts: Used as the structural base inside Knob and Icon Knob components. Not used standalone.
usage.features: Platform-adaptive shape (pill for iOS, circle for Android), white fill with gray border and drop shadow

background.description: Mobile knob container iOS background color - gray/0 - #ffffff

width.description: Mobile knob container iOS border width - 1px solid

color.description: Mobile knob container iOS border color - neutral/gray-400 - #98a2b3

width.description: Mobile knob container iOS width - 36px (wider than tall, creating the pill/capsule shape) - 39px

border-radius.description: Mobile knob container iOS border radius - fully rounded pill (rounded-[100px] in Figma)

android.$comment: Android circular knob container — SVG image asset, not CSS-rendered

size.description: Mobile knob container Android size - 24×24px (square bounding box; the circular knob shape and shadow are embedded in the SVG image asset) - 24px

border-radius.description: Mobile knob container Android border radius intent - full circle (rounded-[300px] in Figma; applied to the SVG container div, but the visual circle is in the image asset)

shadow.description: Mobile knob container iOS drop shadow - shadow/md: 0px 2px 4px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.06), 0px 4px 8px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.10)
